component.name: Cascade
component.summary: Native GUI for rclone and rsync

description.p: Cascade is a lightweight, native GTK4 / libadwaita application for driving rclone and rsync: backups, syncs, copies, mounts and remote management. It is friendly for everyday use yet exposes the real power of both tools, and always shows the exact command it runs.

ul.li: Copy, sync (mirror) and move with rclone or rsync
Browse cloud remotes and pick paths without typing
Live progress (speed, ETA) and cancellable jobs
Dry-run by default and confirmation gates for destructive operations
Reusable profiles, run history, and per-run logs

description.p: Initial development release: core pipeline, New Job flow, live progress, profiles, history, settings, and an rclone remote browser.
